# StringListCatalog.Parse method

Parse a per-locale StringList bundle. *nameOf* maps a table's SNO id to its CoreTOC name (optional, for diagnostics).

public static StringListCatalog Parse(ReadOnlySpan<byte> bundle, string locale, 
    Func<int, string?>? nameOf = null)
